assertions.evidence: Covered by milestone4 public profile/account tests, new public profile client tests (`PublicUserProfilePage.test.tsx`), and auth/account route checks. Includes empty-username redirect (VAL-USER-051) and extra date-field formatting path (VAL-USER-052).

summary: Validated public profile/account behaviors and auth gating requirements against the fixed route/API/UI paths.
